description: The template can be used to empower, educate, and inform your audience to promote change, equity, and inclusion. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
• News
  • Podcast
  • Donate

Long-standing racism towards people of Asian descent has been amplified amid the pandemic, Ultimately leading to horrific acts of violence and hate. It is time to #StopTheHate.

Our goal is to give everyone a voice. Our work is not done until everyone is visible and heard.

READ MORE →

Change starts with listening.

We sat down with thought leaders in the Asian Community to take time to listen, to learn, and to amplify their voices.

13:20

Silence about hate is an endorsement of hate.

As Martin Luther King Jr. said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.” Join the movement to find out practical ways that you can make a difference.

Podcast: All Voices Heard

Enjoy a weekly discussion about equality, community, and unity.

LISTEN NOW →

Have a story?
Share it.

Your story holds immense power. By sharing your experiences, you help to give voice to others with similar experiences. Together, we can shine as light in the midst of darkness.

SPEAK UP →

paragraph.html:
Long-standing racism towards people of Asian descent has been amplified amid the pandemic, Ultimately leading to horrific acts of violence and hate. It is time to #StopTheHate.

Our goal is to give everyone a voice. Our work is not done until everyone is visible and heard.
We sat down with thought leaders in the Asian Community to take time to listen, to learn, and to amplify their voices.

image.alt: Not to speak is to speak. Not to act is to act.

heading.text: Silence about hate is an endorsement of hate.
